mano_cua.result_summary: 状态栏在标准locale下正常显示：包含光标位置(Ln 1 Col 1)、时间、笔记名(Scratch)、语言模式(Plain Text)。该bug需要特定Unicode区域扩展locale才能触发，当前标准环境下状态栏未消失
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Status bar is visible at the bottom of the page with: cursor position (Ln 1 Col 1), time (01:41), note name (Scratch), and language mode (Plain Text). The status bar is functioning normally under the current standard locale. The bug requires specific Unicode locale extensions to trigger the disappearance, which is not the case in this environment.
